ideation: This animation sequence portrays a gesture of agreement and approval, mimicking the action of pressing an OK button. The sequence uses both arms to emphasize the gesture, ending in a relaxed pose. Frame 1 starts with both arms slightly raised, palms facing each other in anticipation. In Frame 2, the arms move forward, palms pressing together as if confirming the OK action. Frame 3 shows a slight pause, with the hands still pressed together before moving apart in Frame 4. Finally, in Frame 5, both arms return to a relaxed position at the sides.

frames.beat: arms start slightly raised, palms facing
both arms press forward, confirming the ok
a brief pause, hands still pressed together
arms pull back, the ok is acknowledged
both arms return to a relaxed state
